originalAlarm.description: Memory dynamically allocated by `malloc`, indirectly via call to `extcon_class_init()` on line 107 is not freed after the last access at line 112, column 1.

presenceCondition: (and (= CONFIG_ANDROID true) (= CONFIG_SYSFS false) (= CONFIG_EXTCON true))
model:
(define-fun CONFIG_SYSFS () Bool
  false)
(define-fun CONFIG_ANDROID () Bool
  true)
(define-fun CONFIG_EXTCON () Bool
  true)
reasoning: PC is infeasible: ANDROID=T causes '#define CONFIG_SYSFS' at L2 in 0dc77b6dabe.c, yet PC requires SYSFS=F — direct contradiction. Configuration cannot exist. Classification: FALSE.
